title: Sync ci.yml with sonash — restore TDMS/CANON/audit validation steps
description: Framework ci.yml is missing TDMS schema validation, CANON validation, audit file checks, debt views generation, and roadmap ref sync that exist in sonash. Also needs action version bumps (setup-node@v6, upload-artifact@v7).

title: Sync semgrep.yml with sonash — restore local rule execution and testing
description: Framework semgrep.yml removed local Semgrep rule installation, custom rule execution, rule testing, and dual SARIF uploads. Also needs codeql-action bump from v3 to v4. Requires creating .semgrep/ directory with custom rules.

title: Sync backlog-enforcement.yml with sonash — align implementation
description: Framework has completely different implementation from sonash. Needs PR commenting, graceful TDMS migration strategy, action SHA pinning for supply chain security, and support for main+master branches.

title: Fix sonarcloud.yml — use sonarcloud-github-action instead of sonarqube-scan-action
description: Framework uses SonarSource/sonarqube-scan-action@v5 but should use SonarSource/sonarcloud-github-action (pinned to SHA). Also missing GITHUB_TOKEN env var needed for PR decoration and projectBaseDir setting.

title: Sync auto-label-review-tier.yml — bump action versions and align features
description: Framework version has outdated action versions (setup-node@v4 vs @v6). Needs *.rules file pattern, policy link, tier color comments, and detailed error handling comments from sonash.

title: Sync docs-lint.yml — bump setup-node to v6 and add .markdownlint.json
description: Minor version differences: setup-node@v4 vs @v6, missing inline comments. Also requires creating .markdownlint.json config file (copy from sonash).

title: Bump codeql.yml actions from v3 to v4
description: Framework uses codeql-action/init@v3 and codeql-action/analyze@v3 while sonash uses @v4. Simple version bump.

title: Add cleanup-branches.yml workflow from sonash
description: Weekly branch cleanup workflow (merged branches >7 days old). Fully generic, no sonash-specific content. Protects main, develop, release/* branches.

title: Add pattern-compliance-audit.yml workflow from sonash
description: Weekly code pattern compliance scanning. Creates GitHub issues if blocking violations >0 or warnings >75. Fully generic. Depends on scripts/check-pattern-compliance.js (already exists as scripts/reviews/check-pattern-compliance.js — adjust path).

title: Add resolve-debt.yml workflow from sonash
description: Auto-resolve DEBT-XXXX items when PR merges. Extracts IDs from PR body Resolves: lines, runs scripts/debt/resolve-bulk.js --eligible-only. Fully generic. Commits to docs/technical-debt/.

title: Add review-check.yml workflow from sonash
description: Check if code review is needed based on PR metrics. Runs scripts/check-review-needed.js (MISSING — must be created). Adds needs-review label, comments on PR with triggers. Requires creating the check-review-needed.js script.

title: Add sync-readme.yml workflow from sonash
description: Auto-sync README status from ROADMAP.md on push to main. Runs scripts/update-readme-status.js (MISSING — must be created). Handles race conditions with retry loop. Fully generic.

title: Add validate-plan.yml workflow from sonash
description: Validate phase completion documentation on PR. Runs scripts/validate-phase-completion.js (MISSING — must be created). Requires framework phase completion system to exist. Lower priority — may need framework-specific path adjustments.

title: Add dependabot.yml, release.yml, and pull_request_template.md from sonash
description: Framework .github/ is missing: dependabot.yml (npm + GitHub Actions auto-updates), release.yml (changelog categories), pull_request_template.md (PR format with DEBT-XXXX tracking). All generic except dependabot /functions entry (remove).

title: Add .markdownlint.json config from sonash
description: Framework docs-lint workflow references markdownlint but no config exists. Copy sonash .markdownlint.json which has 30+ rule customizations. Without it, markdown linting uses defaults and may produce unexpected results.

title: Create check-review-needed.js script (needed by review-check.yml workflow)
description: Script does not exist in framework. Required by review-check.yml workflow. Checks PR metrics (commit count, file count, line changes) against thresholds and outputs JSON with review recommendation. Copy from sonash and adapt.

title: Create update-readme-status.js script (needed by sync-readme.yml workflow)
description: Script does not exist in framework. Required by sync-readme.yml workflow. Parses ROADMAP.md and updates README.md with current status. Copy from sonash and adapt for framework ROADMAP format.

title: Create validate-phase-completion.js script (needed by validate-plan.yml workflow)
description: Script does not exist in framework. Required by validate-plan.yml workflow. Validates phase completion docs have required sections. Copy from sonash and adapt for framework phase structure.

title: minimatch ReDoS vulnerabilities in markdownlint-cli dependency
description: markdownlint-cli depends on minimatch 10.0.0-10.2.2 which has 3 high-severity ReDoS vulnerabilities (GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26, GHSA-7r86-cg39-jmmj, GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74). Fix requires breaking change update to markdownlint-cli@0.44.0 via npm audit fix --force.
